Review Privacy?

Privacy receives mixed reviews, with users highlighting significant issues with account verification and customer support. Many users report account suspensions without clear explanations, leading to frustration and a lack of trust. Some users have experienced difficulties with reactivating accounts and obtaining refunds. However, there are positive reviews praising the service for its security features and ease of use, with some users expressing satisfaction and increased usage. Overall, while Privacy offers a promising concept, its execution and customer service need improvement to address user concerns effectively.

results.title: Malloc VPN: Privacy & Security Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
5.0

Based on 1 review

Review Malloc VPN: Privacy & Security?

Malloc VPN: Privacy & Security is highly praised for its robust protection features, including secure VPN connections, spyware defense, and ad-blocking capabilities. Users commend the app for its excellence and express surprise that it hasn't received award nominations. The company is recognized for its commitment to privacy and is appreciated for being a smaller, independent entity led by females. Overall, the app is celebrated for its effectiveness in enhancing mobile security and empowering users to regain control over their privacy.

Basement Browser

used Venice to build Basement Browser

•3 reviews

Privacy is non-negotiable for Baselings. Your agent lives with you across every page you visit, which means it sees everything. Venice is the only truly private AI infrastructure out there. No logs, no data retention, no compromise. If we're asking users to trust an always-on agent with their browsing, the inference layer has to be trustworthy by default. Venice was the only option that met that bar. [...] Based on 8 reviews

Review Venice?

Venice is praised for its privacy, uncensored nature, and decentralized architecture, making it a standout in the AI landscape. Users appreciate its reliability, ease of use, and responsive customer support. The platform's commitment to open-source models and local data storage enhances security and user control. While it may not update as quickly as some competitors, its unique features, like token-based incentives and diverse model integration, are highly valued. Overall, Venice is recommended for those prioritizing privacy, free speech, and innovative AI solutions.

results.title: Terms of Service
results.content:
## Privacy and Protection of Personal Information

Product Hunt values your privacy. Please review ourPrivacy Policy to learn more about how we collect and use information about you via the Services. The Privacy Policy explains how Product Hunt treats your personal information and protects your privacy when you access Product Hunt and use the Services. [...] | Professional Advisers | Our lawyers, accountants, bankers, auditors and insurers may need to review your personal data to provide consultancy, compliance, banking, legal, insurance, accounting and similar services. |
| Legal and Taxing Authorities, Regulators and Participants in Judicial Proceedings | We may disclose your Personal Data if we believe it is reasonably necessary to comply with a law, regulation, order, subpoena, rule of a self-regulatory organization or audit or to protect the safety of any person, to address fraud, security or technical issues, or to protect our legal rights, interests and the interests of others, such as, for example, in connection with with the acquisition, merger or sale of securities or a business (e.g. due diligence). | [...] ## Changes to Our Privacy & Cookies Policy

We reserve the right, in our sole discretion, to change, modify, add, or remove portions of this Privacy & Cookies Policy at any time. Any changes or updates will be effective immediately upon posting to this page. You should review this Privacy & Cookies Policy regularly for changes. You can determine if changes have been made by checking the Effective Date below. Your continued use of our Site following the posting of any changes to this Privacy & Cookies Policy means you consent to such changes.

results.title: Apple Reviews (2026) | Product Hunt
results.content:
Based on 62 reviews

Review Apple?

Reviewers mostly praise Apple for polished design, reliable performance, long battery life, and an ecosystem that makes devices and features like AirDrop work smoothly together. Several users also point to privacy, stability, and strong hardware, with one calling Vision Pro especially useful for work. The main complaints are familiar: high prices, limited customization, expensive upgrades, and a closed system. A few users also flag repairability and aging base specs like 8GB RAM. Makers of Typeahead and Nativeline add that Apple’s hardware and Swift make native, on-device apps feel fast and practical.
